scripts.build:android: pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform android --profile production
scripts.build:ios: pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform ios --profile production
scripts.build:stores: pnpm dlx eas-cli build --platform all --profile production
scripts.submit:android: pnpm dlx eas-cli submit --platform android --profile production
scripts.submit:ios: pnpm dlx eas-cli submit --platform ios --profile production
